description: Seven-phase disposition pipeline for CRE property exits. Covers hold-sell-refi analysis, pricing strategy, marketing preparation, buyer targeting, offer management, due diligence management, and closing execution. Coordinates 14 specialist agents across sequential phases to produce a terminal verdict of SELL, HOLD, or REFI. May be triggered by hold-period-monitor (EXIT verdict), fund-management orchestrator (wind-down), or direct user request.

validationRules.description: Hold NPV, sell NPV, and refi NPV must all be non-null with base, bull, and bear scenarios for each.
Terminal recommendation must align with the NPV comparison: SELL requires sell NPV > hold NPV by at least the sellPremiumOverHold threshold.
IRR-to-date and projected exit IRR must both be calculated and non-null.

outputs: after-tax proceeds comparison by exit strategy

validationRules.description: Capital gains tax and depreciation recapture must be quantified in dollar terms.
1031 exchange eligibility must be evaluated with clear yes/no/conditional determination.

outputs: refi loan sizing (agency, CMBS, bank, life co)
LP yield impact under refi scenario
refi NPV vs sell NPV comparison

validationRules.description: At least two lender types must be sized with rate, LTV, DSCR, and proceeds.
Prepayment penalty on existing debt must be calculated (yield maintenance, defeasance, or step-down).

passConditions.description: Hold-sell evaluator completed successfully with a clear SELL, HOLD, or REFI recommendation supported by NPV analysis.
If recommendation is SELL, sell NPV exceeds hold NPV by at least the sellPremiumOverHold threshold (default 5%).

conditionalConditions.description: Tax impact analyzer failed or produced incomplete results; after-tax proceeds comparison is partial.
Refi NPV is within 2% of sell NPV; decision is sensitive to rate assumptions.

failConditions.description: Hold-sell evaluator failed to produce any NPV comparison across scenarios.
Critical hold-sell evaluator agent failed after all retry attempts.

recommendation.description: Terminal recommendation: SELL, HOLD, or REFI. Determines whether pipeline continues (SELL), terminates back to hold-period (HOLD), or hands off to capital-stack (REFI).

npvComparison.description: Hold, sell, and refi NPV across base, bull, and bear scenarios. Seeds pricing strategy and marketing preparation.

targetExitPrice.description: Recommended exit price based on sell NPV analysis. Starting point for pricing strategy.

irrToDate.description: IRR achieved from acquisition through current period. Context for LP reporting and exit decision.

afterTaxProceeds.description: After-tax proceeds by strategy (outright sale, 1031 exchange, installment sale). Seeds tax-optimal execution.

refiAnalysis.description: Refinance feasibility and sizing. Required if recommendation is REFI; passed to capital-stack orchestrator.

holdDecisionRationale.description: Narrative rationale for HOLD decision. Required if recommendation is HOLD; passed back to hold-period-monitor.

crossAgentValidations.description: Refi NPV produced by refi-alternative-analyzer must match the refi scenario in hold-sell-evaluator within 2%.
Gross proceeds used in tax impact analysis must match the sell NPV basis from hold-sell-evaluator.

validationRules.description: At least 3 comparable sales must be identified and adjusted, with no comp older than 12 months.
Asking price must fall within 10% of the adjusted comp set range.
Implied cap rate at asking price must be within the submarket cap rate range.

outputs: target return analysis per buyer type

validationRules.description: All five buyer segments (institutional, PE, family office, 1031/tax-motivated, local operator) must be analyzed with return metrics.
At least one buyer segment must achieve target returns at or near the asking price.

requiredDataKeys.description: Must be SELL to proceed to pricing. HOLD and REFI terminate or redirect the pipeline.
Target exit price from NPV analysis seeds the pricing strategy.
NPV comparison provides context for pricing sensitivity analysis.

passConditions.description: Asking price is within comp range and at least one buyer segment can achieve target returns.
Both pricing-analyst and buyer-universe-segmenter completed successfully.

conditionalConditions.description: Asking price is within comp range but at the upper end; limited buyer universe.
Market cycle analysis suggests waiting 3-6 months could improve pricing by >3%.

failConditions.description: No buyer segment can achieve target returns at asking price. Repricing required.
Asking price exceeds comp range by more than maxDiscountFromBOV threshold.

askingPrice.description: Final recommended asking price supported by comp analysis and buyer viability.

compAdjustmentGrid.description: Comparable sales with adjustments. Minimum 3 comps with line-item adjustments.

buyerUniverse.description: Five-segment buyer universe with return analysis and probability-weighted pricing per segment.

pricingStrategy.description: Recommended approach: broad marketing, targeted outreach, or off-market.

impliedCapRate.description: Cap rate implied by asking price and current NOI.

crossAgentValidations.description: Asking price from pricing-analyst must be the same price used in buyer-universe-segmenter return analysis.

outputs: data room index and population checklist

validationRules.description: OM must include executive summary, investment highlights, financial analysis, market overview, and property description.
Data room checklist must be at least 80% populated before marketing launch.
T-12 financials in OM must reconcile to source T-12 operating statement within 0.1%.
At least 3 broker candidates must be evaluated with market-specific transaction history.
Recommended commission rate must be benchmarked against market norms for asset class and price point.

requiredDataKeys.description: Asking price required for OM preparation and broker selection.
Listing vs off-market approach drives broker selection and OM format.
Target buyer segments inform OM narrative and broker selection criteria.

passConditions.description: Offering memorandum is complete with all required sections and reconciled financials.
Broker selected (if listing approach) or buyer target list ready (if off-market).
No material undisclosed defects identified during OM preparation.

conditionalConditions.description: Data room is between 80% and 100% populated; remaining items identified for follow-up.

failConditions.description: Material property defect discovered during OM preparation that was not previously disclosed. Pipeline halted for remediation.
OM financials do not reconcile to source documents.

omPackage.description: Complete offering memorandum with narrative, financial summary, and investment highlights.

dataRoomIndex.description: Data room document index with population status and access controls.

brokerSelection.description: Selected broker with commission terms and listing agreement parameters.

marketingTimeline.description: Marketing timeline with launch date, call-for-offers deadline, and best-and-final date.

crossAgentValidations.description: Asking price in OM must match the price used for broker commission calculations.

outputs: outreach pipeline with contact list per segment

validationRules.description: Outreach pipeline must include contacts from at least 3 buyer segments with minimum 10 total targets.
Call-for-offers timeline must be defined with specific dates for OM distribution, tours, initial offers, and best-and-final.

requiredDataKeys.description: OM required for distribution to prospective buyers.
Selected broker leads or supports the outreach effort.

passConditions.description: OM distributed to target buyer list with CA/NDA tracking active.
Property tours scheduled or available for qualified buyers.

conditionalConditions.description: Fewer than 5 CAs signed; outreach may need to be expanded.

failConditions.description: Outreach pipeline empty or OM not distributed. Cannot proceed to offer management.

outreachPipeline.description: Complete outreach pipeline with buyer contacts, segment classification, and outreach status.

casSigned.description: Number of confidentiality agreements signed by prospective buyers.

toursCompleted.description: Number of property tours completed by qualified buyers.

indicationsOfInterest.description: Preliminary indications of interest received before formal call-for-offers.

outputs: buyer retrade risk assessment per offer

validationRules.description: Every received offer must be scored on price, earnest money, DD period, financing contingency, closing timeline, and retrade risk.
Risk-adjusted net proceeds must be calculated for every offer, accounting for retrade probability and closing risk.
Selected offer must meet minimum earnest money threshold (default 2% of price).
PSA must include retrade defense provisions: non-refundable EMD schedule, limited DD scope, as-is language, and liquidated damages.
Negotiated DD period must not exceed maximum DD period threshold (default 45 days).

requiredDataKeys.description: Outreach pipeline required to identify which buyers submitted offers.
At least one CA must be signed for offers to be considered.

passConditions.description: At least one qualified offer at or above target price with acceptable PSA terms.
PSA negotiated and agreed with retrade defense provisions in place.

conditionalConditions.description: Best offer is below target but within consideration range (within maxDiscountFromBOV).
Selected buyer has financing contingency; not an all-cash or balance-sheet buyer.

failConditions.description: No qualified offers received. Pipeline may loop back to Phase 2 for repricing or terminate.
Unable to reach agreement on PSA terms with any qualified buyer.

offers.description: Array of all received offers with comparison matrix scores and ranking.

selectedBuyer.description: Selected buyer profile with offer terms, financing structure, and retrade risk assessment.

psaStatus.description: PSA execution status with key terms, DD period dates, earnest money schedule, and closing date.

retradeRiskProfile.description: Retrade risk assessment for selected buyer including financing contingency analysis and historical retrade behavior.

crossAgentValidations.description: Price in PSA markup must match the selected offer price from offer-comparator.

validationRules.description: Estoppel collection progress must be tracked against PSA threshold (typically 75-80% of GLA or units).
Every buyer DD objection must be classified as legitimate finding, price fishing, or strategic retrade.
Lender payoff statement must be requested within 5 days of PSA execution.
Seller BATNA must be calculated: cost of concession vs cost of re-marketing and carrying the asset.
Any recommended concession must not exceed the cost of re-marketing and carrying the asset for 6 months.

requiredDataKeys.description: Executed PSA required to define DD period, scope, and earnest money schedule.
Selected buyer profile required for DD management and retrade risk assessment.
Retrade risk profile informs DD management strategy and defense posture.

passConditions.description: Buyer waived DD contingency with no retrade. Proceeding to closing.
Estoppel certificates collected at or above PSA threshold.

conditionalConditions.description: Minor retrade agreed within tolerance (e.g., repair credit, proration adjustment). Moving to close.
Estoppels below PSA threshold but buyer agreed to waive or reduce threshold.

failConditions.description: Buyer attempted material retrade exceeding acceptable concession limits. Evaluate backup buyers.
Buyer terminated PSA during DD period.

estoppelStatus.description: Estoppel collection status with return rate, discrepancies, and PSA threshold compliance.

ddResponseStatus.description: DD response log with all buyer requests, seller responses, and timeline compliance.

retradeAttempts.description: Array of retrade attempts (may be empty) with classification, response, and resolution.

ddVerdict.description: DD management verdict: PASS (buyer waived), CONDITIONAL (minor retrade agreed), FAIL (buyer terminated or material retrade).

lenderPayoffStatus.description: Lender payoff statement status including payoff amount, good-through date, and wire instructions.

crossAgentValidations.description: DD objection classifications from seller-dd-coordinator must be consistent with retrade attempt classifications from retrade-defense-analyst.

validationRules.description: All seller-side closing conditions must be tracked with status (cleared, pending, blocked).
Prorations must be calculated for rent, taxes, insurance, and utilities with variance within 2% of preliminary estimates.
All required closing deliverables (deed, bill of sale, assignment of leases, FIRPTA, owner's affidavit) must be prepared or in progress.
Sum of all distributions (LP + GP) must equal net sale proceeds within $1 tolerance.
Preferred return must be calculated from capital contribution date through distribution date for each LP.
GP promote must be calculated at correct tier thresholds per JV/fund agreement.
Realized IRR and equity multiple must be calculated for each LP and the overall fund position.

requiredDataKeys.description: DD verdict must be PASS or CONDITIONAL to proceed to closing.
Estoppel collection status required for closing condition verification.
Lender payoff amount and wire instructions required for funds flow.

passConditions.description: All seller-side closing conditions cleared. Ready to close.
Distribution waterfall balances: sum of all distributions equals net proceeds.
All required closing deliverables prepared and ready for execution.

conditionalConditions.description: Prorations calculated based on estimates; final true-up pending post-closing reconciliation.

failConditions.description: Distribution waterfall does not balance. Do not distribute until resolved.
Critical closing condition cannot be cleared (e.g., title issue, lender consent withheld).

closingChecklist.description: Complete closing checklist with all conditions and clearance status.

prorations.description: Prorations for rent, taxes, insurance, and utilities as of closing date.

distributionWaterfall.description: Full waterfall calculation with tier-by-tier breakdown, GP promote, and per-LP distributions.

finalProceeds.description: Final net proceeds after debt payoff, closing costs, broker commission, and prorations.

realizedReturns.description: Realized IRR and equity multiple for the investment, per-LP and overall.

crossAgentValidations.description: Net proceeds calculated by closing coordinator must match the total distributable amount used in waterfall calculation.

propertyId.description: Property identifier for disposition pipeline. Primary key for all checkpoint and log paths.

holdPeriodPerformance.description: Summary of hold period financial performance including cumulative cash flows, NOI trajectory, and return metrics.

currentNOI.description: Current quarter annualized NOI for disposition pricing and buyer underwriting.

currentOccupancy.description: Current physical occupancy rate as a decimal for disposition marketing materials.

debtMaturityDate.description: Loan maturity date in ISO 8601 format. Drives disposition timeline urgency.

exitTriggerReason.description: Reason for exit recommendation (debt maturity, target return achieved, NOI decline, market timing).

marketConditions.description: Latest market position and competitive analysis for disposition pricing context.

crossChainHandoffs.triggerCondition: Fund wind-down initiated or exit sequence prioritized for this property

fundId.description: Fund identifier for portfolio-level exit sequencing.

exitSequencePriority.description: Priority order in which this property should be disposed within the fund exit sequence.

targetExitDate.description: Target date by which disposition must be completed for fund-level reporting.

minimumProceeds.description: Minimum acceptable proceeds for fund-level return targets. May constrain pricing flexibility.

propertyId.description: Property identifier for capital stack pipeline.

currentDebtTerms.description: Current loan terms for refinance comparison and sizing.

refiAnalysis.description: Refinance feasibility assessment, loan sizing by lender type, and cash-out potential from Phase 1.

currentNOI.description: Current quarter annualized NOI for refinance underwriting and loan sizing.

propertyId.description: Property identifier for fund-level capital account updates.

saleProceeds.description: Net sale proceeds after debt payoff, closing costs, and broker commission.

distributionWaterfall.description: Complete waterfall calculation with per-LP distributions for capital account updates.

taxImpact.description: Tax impact summary including capital gains, depreciation recapture, and 1031 exchange status.

closingDate.description: Actual closing date in ISO 8601 format for fund reporting.

phase1Hold.action: Terminate pipeline. Return holdDecisionRationale to hold-period-monitor.

phase1Refi.action: Terminate pipeline. Handoff refiAnalysis to capital-stack orchestrator.

phase5NoOffers.action: Loop back to Phase 2 for repricing. Maximum 2 repricing iterations before termination.
